mapper.select: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.getJejuPointList */ SELECT A.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(C.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , C.PARTNER_ID , SUM(NVL(C.REQ_POINT,0)) * 10 AS AMOUNT FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO AND C.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND C.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND C.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND C.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.SELF_CSTMR_CI, C.PARTNER_ID
mapper.insert: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.insertJejuPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_JEJUAIR_01 (BILL_YM , MEMBER_CI , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS BILL_YM , A.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS MEMBER_CI , SUM(C.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST C WHERE A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO AND C.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND C.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND C.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND C.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL GROUP BY A.SELF_CSTMR_CI, C.PARTNER_ID
mapper.select: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.getGiftiPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , USG_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.USG_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.insertGiftiPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_GIFTI_01 (LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS LINK_YM , USG_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , CTN , POINT , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.USG_YM , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, A.USG_YM ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.getTmoneyPointList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.insert: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.insertTmoneyPointList */ INSERT INTO MSP_PARTNER_TMONEY_01 (LINK_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') AS BILL_YM , CONTRACT_NUM , UICC , CTN , POINT , BILL_YM , 'POINT' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.ICC_ID AS UICC , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS CTN , SUM(A.REQ_POINT) AS POINT , A.BILL_YM FROM MSP_PARTNER_POINT_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.SEND_FLAG = 'R' AND A.FULL_PAY_YN = 'Y' AND A.PAY_RESULT IN ('X', 'F') AND A.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM GROUP BY A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.BILL_YM, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.ICC_ID ) WHERE POINT > 0
mapper.select: /* pointChkScheduleMapper.getPartnerSubList */ SELECT IF_NO , UP_DIR , DOWN_DIR FROM MSP_PARTNER_SUB WHERE IF_NO = #{ifNo}
